infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: No Sweets needs your location to detect nearby grocery stores and restaurants so it can remind you of your no-sweets goal.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: No Sweets needs your location to detect nearby grocery stores and restaurants.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: No Sweets needs background location access to alert you when you are near a grocery store or restaurant.
